from transformers import AutoTokenizer

tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained("bert-base-uncased")

TOKEN_CACHE: dict[str, list[int]] = {}

def encode_with_cache(text: str) -> list[int]:
    if text not in TOKEN_CACHE:
        TOKEN_CACHE[text] = tokenizer.encode(text, max_length=512, truncation=True)
    return TOKEN_CACHE[text]

def score_documents(documents: list[str]) -> list[float]:
    scores = []
    for doc in documents:
        tokens = encode_with_cache(doc)
        score = len(tokens) / 512.0
        scores.append(score)
    return scores

def build_batch(texts: list[str]) -> dict:
    encoded = tokenizer.batch_encode_plus(texts, max_length=128, padding="max_length", truncation=True)
    return {"input_ids": encoded["input_ids"], "attention_mask": encoded["attention_mask"]}
